author: Surajit Chaudhuri
name: Semantic BPE Tokenizer — Function Word Downsampling
blurb: Novel hypothesis: downsampling grammatical function words (the, a, is, was, etc.) at 30% retention during SentencePiece BPE training forces the vocabulary to allocate more capacity to content-bearing tokens, making BigramHash features more informative. SOTA repro baseline (Int6 QAT + BigramHash + SWA + 10L) achieved pre_quant val_bpb 1.1619 at wallclock stop. Semantic BPE controlled experiment (Run A vs Run B) in progress. Also includes PyTorch 2.4 compatibility fix for enable_gqa in scaled_dot_product_attention.
